# Suggested ni Questions: Namba AI Upgrade

- Which Namba AI surfaces and daily-work contexts are in scope?
- What does "more alive" mean in observable interaction behavior?
- What memory sources, retention rules, consent controls, and deletion behavior
  are required?
- What autonomy boundaries keep the assistant helpful without being bossy?
- What baseline and evaluation method will prove the upgrade is useful?
- Which integrations, agent actions, or personality changes are out of scope?
